port_metadata.provider: Compañía Marítima Mexicana, S.A. de C.V.
port_metadata.billing_basis: Rate per Horsepower (H.P.) / Hour per Tug
port_metadata.vessel_dimension_source: Certificate issued by competent Maritime Authority

geographic_scope_and_terminals.limits: Jurisdictional waters of the Port of Coatzacoalcos, Veracruz
terminals: All terminals within the jurisdictional waters of the Port of Coatzacoalcos

billing_logic_definitions.service_description: Towage service for docking, undocking, or anchoring using necessary tugs as required by authorities or pilots

time_measurement.movement_time_definition: Legally considered to be 20 minutes before the time indicated in the service request
time_measurement.start_trigger: Time when lines are exchanged or the tug is ready at the agreed place
time_measurement.end_trigger: Time when lines are cast off or as indicated by the pilot

duration_logic.rounding: Any fraction of 15 minutes is rounded up to a full 15-minute period
duration_logic.surcharge_basis: 25% of the basic quota per 15-minute increment

surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.name: Bow Thruster Discount
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.condition: Vessel effectively uses only one tug and employs an operational Bow Thruster
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.note: If two or more tugs are used, the full tariff applies without discount

surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.name: Small Vessel Discount
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.condition: Vessels less than 3,000 Gross Register Tons (GRT)
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.logic: Applicable charge is 70% of the total maneuver amount

surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.name: Mechanical Deficiency / Failure
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.condition: Vessels presenting machine or steering failures during arrival or departure

surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.name: Late Cancellation
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.condition: Notice given < 1 hour before tug movement (Requested Time - 20 mins)

surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.name: Cancellation After Movement
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.condition: User desists from service once tugs have started moving

surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.name: Waiting / Standby Time
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.condition: Tugs must wait to execute service after the time indicated in request
surcharges_discounts_and_multipliers.basis: Per hour or fraction of wait time

vessel_types.note: Exempt from this tariff; billed under separate office DGP.-1279/2024 (April 4, 2024)

service_types.note: Not subject to fixed rates; subject to negotiation based on international maritime customs

administrative_subtext.notice_period: Request must be submitted in writing 3 hours in advance during business hours
administrative_subtext.payment_requirement: Users must cover the estimated service amount at the time of request; final adjustment made upon invoice
administrative_subtext.resolution_authority: General Directorate of Ports of the Secretariat of the Navy (SEMAR)
